audit_items.proof_trace: Property holds: P2P blocks undergo mandatory signature verification via BlockSignatureStrategy::VerifyBulk (L127-147) which validates all signatures including proposer, randao, attestations, and operations. GossipVerifiedBlock (block_verification.rs:L830-1073) verifies proposer signature before gossip propagation, then SignatureVerifiedBlock (L1156) bulk-verifies all remaining signatures, followed by per_block_processing with NoVerification strategy (L1618) since signatures were already checked. The validate-then-process pipeline is enforced at multiple layers.
